subject: Burning Scarf, a Trainer Item card depicting a red scarf with flame-like appearance
description: The card depicts a red scarf rendered with a warm, slightly flame-tinged quality. The scarf is shown isolated against a white or light background, tied loosely so its ends trail. The item has a simple, clean presentation typical of Pokemon Trainer cards. The red tones and the item's name connect visually — the scarf reads as fiery through its warm crimson color and flowing form. No figure, no Pokemon depicted — just the object itself.
